resources.string: Simple travel planning for rail and bike
Your daily overview at a glance
Start with a clear dashboard for active routes, upcoming departures and quick status information.
Keep a simple area for saved routes, station stops and bike-friendly connections in one place.
Use this section for account settings, favorite stations and travel preferences as the app grows.
This area is ready for your %1$s screen content and gives you a solid default layout to build on.
Bottom navigation is already connected and ready for further screens.
